_comment: Tier-1 mcp_tool source presets for audiobookshelf-mcp (AU-KG.ingest.mcp-tool-connector). Syncs Audiobookshelf libraries into the KG as :Library records via the audiobookshelf-mcp MCP server's condensed library_operations tool (action=list). Contributed presets win over the central MCP_TOOL_PRESETS. Extend with library-items / authors presets as needed.
